feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: LSMW for OBCB
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating LSMW for transaction OBCB with Batch input option.

In the first pop-up( BDC recording (SAPLSVIX 0100 ) , I give the partner type, Partner number and company code. press enter.

In the next screen,( BDC recording (SAPL0F11 0061 ) I click on new entries,  Goods service number,  text, Gl a/c and company code.  and press save.  

click on up arrow button. 

I am expecting this process to repeat in the LSMW; but the BDC is failing as it is expecting entries in screen 61 and not going back to selection screen. 

Anyone tried this before, can let me know what to do ? Thanks

entry.title: ABAP CDS Views: Value Help Based on Foreign Key Relationship
entry.content:
Introduction of CDS Views:

CDS (Core Data Services) views are a key concept in SAP's data modeling framework, designed to define, consume, and manage data in a more efficient and flexible way. CDS views provide an abstraction layer over the database tables and allow for a more structured and standardized approach to working with data within SAP applications, especially in the context of SAP S/4HANA and SAP HANA systems.

Key Characteristics of CDS Views:

  • Declarative Data Modeling: CDS views allow you to define the data model using a declarative syntax, focusing on what data is needed rather than how to retrieve it.
  • SQL-based: They are based on SQL, making them highly optimized for performance and leveraging the power of the SAP HANA database.
  • Layer of Abstraction: CDS views abstract the complexity of direct database table interactions, which simplifies data consumption for application developers and users.
  • Integration with SAP Fiori and Analytics: CDS views are deeply integrated with SAP Fiori, SAP Gateway, and other SAP applications, making it easier to expose data for reporting and analytics.

Types of CDS Views:

There are mainly two types of CDS views:

  1. Basic CDS Views:
    • These are simple views that pull data from one or more database tables or other views. They are typically used to define basic data structures that will be further extended or consumed by other views or applications.
  2. Consumption CDS Views:
    • These are used to expose data for consumption in applications or analytics tools. They often involve annotations for specifying how the data should be presented in user interfaces (e.g., SAP Fiori apps), or for integration with reporting tools.
  3. Composite CDS Views:
    • These combine multiple basic views or tables and provide a more complex dataset. They are useful for aggregating data or creating more intricate data models.
  4. Parameterized CDS Views:
    • These accept parameters, making the view flexible and reusable for different input values.

In SAP, ensuring an efficient and user-friendly experience for entering and selecting data is crucial for business processes. One of the most used features for this purpose is F4 Value Help. This feature provides users with a list of possible values to choose from, making data entry faster, more accurate, and less prone to errors.

With the introduction of Core Data Services (CDS) Views in SAP, F4 Value Help has become even more powerful, enabling seamless integration with advanced data models. In this blog, we’ll dive into how F4 value help works in CDS Views. So, let’s begin…

Working of F4 Value Help

Here we have created a basic CDS view with all the required field. On top of it we have a composite view with all the required annotations, and on top of composite view we have a consumption view. Let’s go into details in each view with the screenshots below:

Here, I have created a basic view using ‘C_EWM_WarehouseTaskLeanQ’. As per the requirement, many other fields were needed along with Warehouse and date fields. In the basic view, we can select all the required field and even can make some arithmetic calculations. 

 

Once the basic view is created, we must create a composite view. In the composite view, we select all the fields of basic view along with the association on the F4 help CDS view, which is ‘I_EWMWarehouseNumber’ in this case. All the annotations required for the composite view and the F4 value help are mentioned below:

For Composite view:

@vdm: {viewType : #COMPOSITE } – to declare view as composite

@analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE - defines a cube view. This means it can be consumed by a CDS Analytical Projection View. The fields of a cube view can play the role of either a dimension or a measure.

For F4 value help:

@search.defaultSearchElement: true - Specifies that the element is to be considered in a freestyle search.

@search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8 - Specifies the least level of fuzziness (with regard to some comparison criteria passed at runtime) the element must have to be considered in a fuzzy search at all.

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association:'_WarehouseF4Help' - work with primary key of CDS view used in association. Here we must provide the direct mapping to the text view (I_EWM_WarehouseNumber). Also, expose the association as it is done in the snap below.

In the consumption view, below annotations are must for F4 value help to work.

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_WarehouseF4Help' – provides the foreign key relation to the F4 help view.

@Consumption.valueHelp: '_WarehouseF4Help.Warehouse' – links to the required field in the F4 help view.

Below are the snaps of UI5 application where we have F4 help enabled.

 

Conclusion:

ABAP CDS views are crucial for enhancing data consumption and providing a user-friendly experience in SAP applications. The F4 Value Help based on foreign key relationships allows users to select values with ease, improving efficiency and reducing errors. This feature is especially beneficial when integrating complex data models in SAP S/4HANA environments, where the correct values are required for proper data entry.

References:

Value help based on foreign key relationship.

ObjectModel Annotation.

AnalyticsDetails Annotations.

entry.title: Find the tables that use the structure BAPI_TE_WBS_ELEMENT
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I have recently upgrade an S4 system 2021FPS02 -> 2023FPS03.

SPDD reported that the structure BAPI_TE_WBS_ELEMENT had been modified in the system.
In order to know if a Reset could imply loosing columns in tables, I would like to list which tables do use this structure.

What is the easiest way to find the Tables that uses this structure ?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: using selection screen tabbed block how to bind SALV, OOAOV,ALV ??
entry.content:
I Want to Bind ALV to Tabbed block. any suggestion might Help me.

it is not showing in tabbed block, instead it shows in different screen if you click any other tabbed block and come back again.

I am working on an SAP ABAP report that uses a tabbed selection-screen block to display different datasets (e.g., Purchase Orders, Inbound Deliveries, Payment Details, etc.). However, when I use CL_SALV_TABLE to display an ALV report inside a tab, it opens in a new screen instead of displaying within the tabbed block.

Here is the simplified structure of my code:

  • I define selection-screen tabs with subscreens (100–112).

  • When a tab is selected, it should display an ALV report within the same tab.

  • Currently, my ALV grid opens in a new full screen, which is not the expected behavior.

I have tried:

  • Using CL_SALV_TABLE but it does not display inside the tab.

  • Creating a subscreen but struggling to integrate ALV within it.

How can I display the ALV output inside the tabbed block (not a separate screen) using CL_SALV_TABLE or CL_GUI_ALV_GRID?

Any guidance, corrections, or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

DATA: lv_lifnr   TYPE lfa1-lifnr,
      lt_po_data TYPE TABLE OF ekko,
      lt_po_item TYPE TABLE OF ekpo,
      lt_inbound TYPE TABLE OF mseg,
      lt_payment TYPE TABLE OF bseg.

DATA: lo_salv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.

SELECT-OPTIONS: so_vndr FOR lv_lifnr.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF TABBED BLOCK tabs FOR 18 LINES.

  SELECTION-SCREEN: TAB (20) tab1 USER-COMMAND fc1 DEFAULT SCREEN 100,
  TAB (20) tab2 USER-COMMAND fc2 DEFAULT SCREEN 101,
  TAB (20) tab3 USER-COMMAND fc3 DEFAULT SCREEN 102,
  TAB (20) tab4 USER-COMMAND fc4 DEFAULT SCREEN 103,
  TAB (20) tab5 USER-COMMAND fc5 DEFAULT SCREEN 104,
  TAB (20) tab6 USER-COMMAND fc6 DEFAULT SCREEN 105,
  TAB (20) tab7 USER-COMMAND fc7 DEFAULT SCREEN 106,
  TAB (20) tab8 USER-COMMAND fc8 DEFAULT SCREEN 107,
  TAB (20) tab9 USER-COMMAND fc9 DEFAULT SCREEN 108,
  TAB (20) tab10 USER-COMMAND fc10 DEFAULT SCREEN 109,
  TAB (20) tab11 USER-COMMAND fc11 DEFAULT SCREEN 110,
  TAB (20) tab12 USER-COMMAND fc12 DEFAULT SCREEN 111,
  TAB (20) tab13 USER-COMMAND fc13 DEFAULT SCREEN 112.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK tabs.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 100 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 100.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 101 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 101.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 102 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 102.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 103 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 103.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 104 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 104.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 105 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 105.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 106 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 106.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 107 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 107.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 108 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 108.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 109 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 109.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 110 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 110.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 111 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 111.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 112 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 112.

INITIALIZATION.

  tab1 = 'Purchase Orders'.
  tab2 = 'Inbound Delivery'.
  tab3 = 'Payment Details'.
  tab4 = 'Vendor Master'.
  tab5 = 'Goods Receipt'.
  tab6 = 'Invoice Receipt'.
  tab7 = 'Open PO Items'.
  tab8 = 'Closed PO Items'.
  tab9 = 'PO History'.
  tab10 = 'Invoice List'.
  tab11 = 'Payment Status'.
  tab12 = 'Goods Movement'.
  tab13 = 'Supplier Evaluation'.

* Sample code to populate internal tables (would be based on logic)

*  Event handling for tab selection (user command)

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.

*AT USER-COMMAND.
  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'FC1'.  " Tab 1 - Purchase Order Details
      PERFORM display_po_data.
    WHEN 'FC2'.  " Tab 2 - Inbound Delivery
      " Add logic for Inbound Delivery
    WHEN 'FC3'.  " Tab 3 - Payment Details
      " Add logic for Payment Details
  ENDCASE.

FORM display_po_data.
*   Get Purchase Orders based on selected vendor(s)
  SELECT * FROM ekko
    INTO TABLE lt_po_data
  UP TO 30 ROWS.
  TRY.
* Create and display the salv grid
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        IMPORTING
          r_salv_table = lo_salv
        CHANGING
          t_table      = lt_po_data ).

* Set the subscreen area for Tab 1 (Purchase Orders)
* lo_salv->get_functions( )->set_screen( 100 ).  " Set the screen for Tab 1

      lo_salv->display( ).

    CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lx_msg).
      WRITE: / 'Error displaying Purchase Orders: ', lx_msg->get_text( ).
  ENDTRY.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: ITAB to JSON
entry.content:
Hello together,

I have to itabs and I want to serialze them into one JSON. Itab1 has the following fields (EquiNr, Matnr), itab2 has the following fields (OrderNr, Matnr).

With which class/method can I serialize to JSON that the JSON looks like:

{

"Itab1": [

{
"Equipmentnummer": 547891,
"Materialnummer": "0066897",
},
{
"Equipmentnummer": 547892,
"Materialnummer": "0066897",
}
],


"Itab2": [
{
"FaufNr": 275114221,
"Materialnummer": "00982145"
},
{
"FaufNr": 275114222,
"Materialnummer": "00982145"
},

],

"success": true,
"msg": "ok"
}

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: ADT Code Completion is Slow
entry.content:
Hello all,

I just started working with Eclipse + ADT and noticed that the code completion is really quite slow. It takes ~ 300ms for the next keyword to show up.

Coming from SE38 this is a HUGE step down, performance-wise and also with regards to the user experience, since in SE38 the next keyword was suggested instantly.

With Eclipse I program twice as slow now, compared to SE38 simply because of the massive wait times I have to endure and because I have gotten used to the snappy-ness of SE38 causing me to press tab before the code-completion pop up had a chance to show up.

Since I can only barely type 'field-symbol' in the time it would otherwise take for the suggestion to pop up, I wonder, is there a quick fix (pun intended) for this, to reduce the pop up times?

I realize, Eclipse does provide this funtionallity, but only for languages such as C++ or Java.

entry.title: SUSG integration with ATC
entry.content:
Hello All - there are soo many tcodes/ tool within SAP for performing analysis of Sap ECC custom code to S4 Hana conversion , which one is most preferred one ?

custom code  -  Analyze the custom code to S4 using ATC - ? or other SAP Readiness check2.0  /SDF/? 

usage of custom code - SUSG , SCMON , UPL - ? other ?

are there any sap ecc related fiori app to merge information of custom code along with usage ? - like CCMC / CCLM in solution manager ?

 

thanks

entry.title: Table contents shifting on next page in smartforms
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to print 2 texts in my table in main window, but I want to print them together only, currently I have put them in one cell of the row of the table, I have selected in line type of cell as 'no page break' but still as due to previous table contents the current table gets shifted to bottom of table and only one text gets printed and next text go to the next page. I want to print them together even if they shift to next page. If anyone has any hints, please help?

Thanks.

entry.title: ADT Keyword Highlights Are Broken
entry.content:
Hi all,

in ADT, Eclipse, it seems the syntax highlighting is really quite broken. See the following screenshots.

Before placing the cursor in the class-syntax-group:

After placing the cursor in the class-syntax-group:

Notice the color change of the keyword "DEFINTION".

This also happens with other keywords. But this only appears, when the keyword "DEFINTION" is in the same line with the keyword "CLASS". If it is in the next line, the issue does not appear.

Also when using only "*" as a keyword for syntax highlighting, each rune gets colored, eventhough it is not a keyword (such as brackets etc.)

Is there a fix for this?

entry.title: How to Add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 in Purchasing view tab
entry.content:
Hi SAP'ns,

I have requirement to add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 screen under purchasing view tab. 

No need to click any push button it should display in SAP screen like below picture..

Pls guide me to achieve this.

entry.title: Critical vulnerabilities found in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01
entry.content:
Hi,

 

we are interested in using SAP's official SAP Container-Image hosted at https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial.

However, we noticed that this image has not been updated in over six months. After scanning it with Trivy, we identified the following critical vulnerabilities:

  1. CVE-2024-52316 - catalina.jar (version 9.0.90)
  2. CVE-2025-24813 - catalina.jar (version 9.0.90)
  3. CVE-2024-24790 - in the proprietary binary /usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit

 

We are likely able to patch the Tomcat-related issues (1 and 2) ourselves by replacing catalina.jar with version 9.0.99, which contains the official security fixes provided by Apache. 
However, regarding CVE-2024-24790, the affected file /usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit is a proprietary binary owned by SAP (and the container's entrypoint). As such, we are unable to patch it ourselves.
Please note that our company security policies prohibit the use of any container image with critical vulnerabilities. Therefore, we kindly request an updated version of the image or guidance on how to mitigate this issue.

This is the scan-report:

 

8f49966c16f3 (sles 15.3)

Total: 0 (CRITICAL: 0)

2025-03-28T08:02:37+01:00	INFO	Table result includes only package filenames. Use '--format json' option to get the full path to the package file.

Java (jar)

Total: 2 (CRITICAL: 2)

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────┬──────────┬────────┬───────────────────┬─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     Library                      │ Vulnerability  │ Severity │ Status │ Installed Version │      Fixed Version      │                           Title                            │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────┼──────────┼────────┼───────────────────┼─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ org.apache.tomcat:tomcat-catalina (catalina.jar) │ CVE-2024-52316 │ CRITICAL │ fixed  │ 9.0.90            │ 9.0.96, 10.1.30, 11.0.1 │ tomcat: Apache Tomcat: Authentication bypass when using    │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ Jakarta Authentication API                                 │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2024-52316                 │
│                                                  ├────────────────┤          │        │                   ├─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                  │ CVE-2025-24813 │          │        │                   │ 11.0.3, 10.1.35, 9.0.99 │ tomcat: Potential RCE and/or information disclosure and/or │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ information corruption with partial PUT...                 │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2025-24813                 │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────┴──────────┴────────┴───────────────────┴─────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit (gobinary)

Total: 1 (CRITICAL: 1)

┌─────────┬────────────────┬──────────┬────────┬───────────────────┬─────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Library │ Vulnerability  │ Severity │ Status │ Installed Version │  Fixed Version  │                           Title                            │
├─────────┼────────────────┼──────────┼────────┼───────────────────┼─────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ stdlib  │ CVE-2024-24790 │ CRITICAL │ fixed  │ v1.20.4           │ 1.21.11, 1.22.4 │ golang: net/netip: Unexpected behavior from Is methods for │
│         │                │          │        │                   │                 │ IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses                                 │
│         │                │          │        │                   │                 │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2024-24790                 │
└─────────┴────────────────┴──────────┴────────┴───────────────────┴─────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 

Thank you for your support.

 

Best Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Cannot delete custom Business Function Set - SFW3 (switch framework)
entry.content:
I have created a Business Function Set ZZZ via SFW3, which I used to activate a custom switch (via a business function). Now I want to delete it, the business function is deactivated in SFW5:

But I obtain this error message when deleting:

Deletion is not possible
Business Function Set ZZZ is currently activated system-wide

How can I deactivate it system-wide?

entry.title: Xstep. How to get context of XSTEP Tree via ABAP tools like XS_GET_CONTEXT or any others...
entry.content:
Dear all

i'm struggling to get to the way how to interpret data from XS_GET_CONTEXT which is returning context object in a complex multireference embedded structure....

I need to have access to Control_recipe context releven sections of XSTEP tree to have some custom checks during Control Recipe generation (CONTROL_RECIPE_CREATE FM which is triggered in Process order release).

Using XS_GET_CONTEXT of CL_COCR_CMX_TOP class gives IO_CONTEXT object with copmlex embedded structure with nodes: OBJECT, CLC_CMX_CX_NODE, CLC_CMX_CX_NODE_LEAF, CLC_CMX_CX_CONTEXT

and i managed to find steps of level 1 (where root step i treat as level 0) when i click on M_PARENT under CLC_CMX_CX_NODE and in M_PARENT under LCL_CMX_PERSISTENT node there is M_PERSISTENT_CHILDS table with lines refering to STEPS of Xtree level 1.

If i use XS_GET_CONTEXT_FROM_NODE  method of the same class, then it seems that using CM_SESSION under M_PARENT gives M_PERSISTENT object with reference to all steps in XSTEP tree, but only to the header of step and not to the end level of details (refer to CM_Session_all_steps.png).

Could you please help to understand the following:

1) how to read entire Xstep tree data with abap tools from Process order

2) how to read specific Xstep step from header level to the final level of details (process instructions assigned, etc, etc).

3) how to interpet objects like IO_CONTEXT, IO_NODE described above... 

Thanks a lot in advance,

KR, Andrew.

entry.title: HTML company code logo image in the invoice form for interactive signs through Digital Signature
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have implemented the Digital Signature at company code level, however the client has one root certificate across all 5 company codes. Client requirement is to showcase 5 different company code logo images in the invoice form and link it with Digital signature .pfx file. We informed them to have 5 diff root certificate for the same. Also we cannot display any image and hyperlink the digital signature on it.

Experts please suggest how to achieve this or any workaround we can do. I am unable to get any appropriate SAP blog to convince our client.

entry.title: DRF - How to deal with updated entries on source table for replication?
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like some guidance, please, on what can be a good option to deal with update of source tables on replication. I thought about configuring change pointers, but all my DRFs are using "Replication via Services" and i only could find explanation for that when it's via RFC or iDoc. 

My intention is to replicate all values on a first time and every occurrence after that send only the delta.

Can you help me please?

Regards!

entry.title: 2 steps-Workaround for unavailable Excel export function in ALV report
entry.content:
Hello, as I realized that it may be helpful for colleagues SAP Consultants/Users, I'm also sharing here a workaround in ALV report when export button is not showing.

N.B : This requires the print button to be displayed at least, as well as an output device (printer) to be active in system.

  1. once your ALV report is displayed, click on the print button and select LP01 as output device (try alternative printers if LP01 is not available)

2. Go to transaction SP01 and retrieve the related spool-> click on the little blue square next to it

That's it! Local file export button is now displayed with spreadsheet export type option 🎉
 

Credits to my great snipping tool : Greenshot

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Update delivery date in confirmation tab in PO
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to update the delivery date for multiple POs using an Excel file. 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE' doesn’t update the confirmation; it only displays it. 'ME_PO_CONFIRM' works, but only the first time for one PO.

I can use BDC, however ME22N is an enjoy tcode....

How can I achieve this? Any advice would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Logical Path and Logical File field is missing in LSMW
entry.content:
Hello, 

Some of the blogs I found in internet has Logical Path/File in their LSMW->Specify Files->Converted Data

Sample

But in our LSMW the Logical Path and Logical File is missing

How to add the Logical Path and Logical File Field in LSMW->Specify Files->Converted Data? I tried to do some research, and I can't see any useful information.

entry.title: FM or BAPI to create Collective Production order
entry.content:
Hi All,
    I want to link a production order to a existing collective production order . Is there any FM or BAPI available which i use to achieve this requirement.
